---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the workflow, docs, or contributor experience
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest useful change that would help.

## Why It Matters

Explain the impact on workflow quality, clarity, onboarding, or delivery.

## Alternatives Considered

List any other approaches you considered.

## Additional Context

Add examples, screenshots, or notes if useful.
